evals.prompt: Refine requirements for this issue before execution: https://gitlab.com/group/app/-/issues/1234
evals.expected_output: Reads issue via MCP, investigates relevant module, posts internal comment with @author (opener) and numbered requester-facing questions; no label/branch questions

evals.prompt: Run grill-me on issue #567 — list what's missing and post on the issue for the author to answer
evals.expected_output: Batch numbered questions in one internal GitLab comment; no interactive one-by-one chat Q&A; questions in plain UX language

evals.prompt: Issue mentions 'adjust Person filter' but is vague. ISSUE_URL=... DRY_RUN=true
evals.expected_output: Shows comment draft in chat only; Assumptions may cite code paths; Questions ask when filter applies, combined criteria, empty state — not table/SQL/branch

evals.prompt: Issue missing Team label and milestone 1.32 with remote branch develop_1.32. Enrich requirements.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT ask about missing Team label or which develop branch to use; at most may ask if milestone is correct; focuses on product behavior gaps

evals.prompt: Technical gap: PESSOA|CLUBE has no idFuncao. Formulate enricher questions.
evals.expected_output: Question like 'Does latest role only apply when filtering by Club too? What counts as latest?' — never 'the linktable with relation PESSOA|CLUBE...'

evals.prompt: Enrich issue opened by author with author.name 'GDP DataCloud Brasil' and author.username 'GDPDC'.
evals.expected_output: First comment line uses @GDPDC (literal author.username from read_issue), not @gdp_datacloudbrasil or any slug of author.name
First line starts with ❌ and mentions 3 blocking question(s); not ✅

evals.prompt: Enrich issue with no blocking gaps.
evals.expected_output: First line starts with ✅ and Ready for execution; uses execution-ready template; no Questions section
